title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Xerox IT Solution Limited
body: "Application number 5023  Applicant Xerox Corporation and Xerox Limited objected to the name used by Xerox IT Solution Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 28 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Xerox IT Solution Limited is changed to 15563327, LTD. "
